violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Coke bibs, containers of orange juice found on floor in bar area.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --- Air hand dryer in women's restroom paint in peeling.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Shelving in kitchen needs to be cleaned. - Fans in walk-in cooler needs to be cleaned. - Bottom of reach-in freezer needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration - Sink found at 0ppm QT corrected to 400ppm QT

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. - To go boxes found on dirty bottom shelf in kitchen. Staff corrected.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls and floor behind fryer needs to be cleaned. - Ceiling above the fryer needs to be cleaned. - Floor in walk-in freezer need repair. - Wall in room ice machine needs repair
